name: analytics-workspace
title: Agent-Native Analytics Workspace
description: Agent-Native Analytics Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.

    "title": "Agent-Native Analytics",

          "label": "Catchall",
          "route": "/analytics/:"

        {
          "label": "Home",
          "route": "/analytics"
        },
        {
          "label": "Adhoc Detail",
          "route": "/analytics/adhoc/:id"
        },
        {
          "label": "Analyses Detail",
          "route": "/analytics/analyses/:id"
        },
        {
          "label": "Analyses Index",
          "route": "/analytics/analyses"
        },
        {
          "label": "Ask",
          "route": "/analytics/ask"
        },
        {
          "label": "Catalog",
          "route": "/analytics/catalog"
        },
        {
          "label": "Chart",
          "route": "/analytics/chart"
        }
      ]
    },

        "page": "page.analytics.catchall",

compatibility.tailwind: Consumes generated --jami-* CSS variables in the Studio UI workbench port.
